Community

Join the conversation

Connect with voice AI builders, get help from the team, share your projects, and help shape the future of conversational AI.

Discord

Real-time chat with the community. Get quick help, share ideas, and connect with other builders.

Join Discord

GitHub

Explore our open source projects, report issues, and contribute to the Ferni ecosystem.

View Repos

Twitter/X

Follow us for announcements, tips, and updates about voice AI and the developer platform.

Follow @ferni_ai

Stack Overflow

Ask technical questions and find answers. Use the ferni-ai tag for best results.

Need help?

Our team is here to help you succeed. Reach out through any of these channels:

  • Discord: Fastest response for quick questions
  • GitHub Issues: Bug reports and feature requests
  • Email: developers@ferni.ai for partnership inquiries
